description_long: This object is a vertical traffic sign consisting of a round, dark-colored sign face mounted atop a slender, metallic post. The post is anchored into a circular, textured base that appears to provide stability. Just below the sign face, there is a small rectangular plate attached to the post, possibly for additional information or reinforcement. The sign face is smooth and featureless, lacking any visible text or pictogram. The materials suggest a combination of metal for the post and base, with the sign face possibly made of coated metal or plastic. The overall design is minimalistic and functional, suitable for urban environments.
description: A round, dark-faced traffic sign on a slender metallic post with a circular base and a small rectangular plate below the sign face. The sign is smooth, featureless, and designed for urban placement.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full round sign face, post, base, and the rectangular plate clearly visible below the sign.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the thin profile of the round sign face and the post, with the rectangular plate seen edge-on.
description_view_2: Rear view similar to the front, showing the back of the round sign face, post, base, and the rectangular plate.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the thin profile of the sign face and post, with the rectangular plate edge-on.
